center.name: Kitanglad Mountain Range
center.summary: Kitanglad Mountain Range是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Mindanao lorikeet、Black-and-cinnamon fantail、Stripe-breasted rhabdornis等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Mount Apo and Kitanglad Mountain Range but like all areas in the Philippines protection is lax

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Due to these local extinctions, the Philippine Red List has listed it as vulnerable. thumb|A Philippine postal stamp from 1969 featuring this species It is found in multiple protected areas such as Mount Apo and Kitanglad Mountain Range but like all areas in the Philippines protection is lax
